description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and a mix of white, black, and terracotta-colored exterior walls. The structure features large, floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house has two main stories with a rooftop terrace and a balcony, as well as an outdoor patio area with seating. Surrounding the house are several trees and a driveway with a parked car, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and open outdoor spaces. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, with a focus on functionality and modern living.
description: A modern, cubic two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, black, and terracotta exterior walls, featuring balconies, a rooftop terrace, and an outdoor patio.
description_view_0: The rear and side of the house are visible, showing a black exterior wall, rooftop terrace, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: The front and main facade are visible, highlighting the terracotta and white walls, large windows, balcony, and patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: The side view shows the driveway with a parked car, the white and terracotta walls, and the rooftop terrace, as well as multiple trees.
description_view_3: The opposite rear view displays a black exterior wall, the driveway, and the main entrance with a glass door and balcony above.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, minimal steps, and a covered area with a balcony above, emphasizing clean lines and modern simplicity.
